t0S_nksiWC.Revised: For recurrent mold issues, spray on a mold preventative <such as Concrobium or Mold Armor> while the belt is still damp.

PmWPn51LGM.Original: If your skin still tingles or burns after cleaning it, immediately seek emergency medical help.
PmWPn51LGM.Revised: If your skin still tingles or burns after cleaning it, immediately seek emergency medical help <through an ambulance>.

sLs0f0pXBL.Original: Look towards the ground, or pretend that you're focused on something important when you walk by, do not make eye contact at all.
sLs0f0pXBL.Revised: Look towards the ground, or pretend that you're focused on something important when you walk by, <like a poster or billboard> do not make eye contact at all.

xOYdVLPTf9.Revised: Check with your local government <to know for sure>.

2WIMCxYPAN.Original: A stubby stenciling brush works best and creates an "orange peel" finish.
2WIMCxYPAN.Revised: A stubby stenciling brush works best and creates an "orange peel" finish, <a slightly bumpy texture that mimics the texture of an orange peel>.

j1Rx2wgDo9.Original: This can help you feel confident in yourself and your abilities.
j1Rx2wgDo9.Revised: This can help you feel confident in yourself and your abilities <by knowing that you're making an impact>.

P3CHXqNBAs.Revised: Avoid clingy, see-through, revealing clothing, <whatever your gender>.

9WMTgOOxv3.Original: Japanese meal time etiquette is pretty easy to learn.
9WMTgOOxv3.Revised: Japanese meal time etiquette is pretty easy to learn, <if you remember a few simple rules>.

Q2Md3buYTi.Original: Knowing how to pack is important, so that you can have the best time possible
Q2Md3buYTi.Revised: Knowing how to pack is important, so that you can have the best time possible <with your entire group>.

YurVa4ZlgP.Original: Get your eyebrows tinted by a professional cosmetologist to ensure they look their best.
YurVa4ZlgP.Revised: Get your eyebrows tinted by a professional cosmetologist <at a brow bar or a beauty salon> to ensure they look their best.

UpO_twMqGF.Revised: Have your transportation arrangements sorted and <readily accessible>.

8ic4aL_9Fi.Original: If you are still unsure of how to get there contact the rangers with the contact information at the bottom.
8ic4aL_9Fi.Revised: If you are still unsure of how to get there contact the rangers with the contact information at the bottom <of your specific towers website>.

aKgfnoc7kv.Original: Take some time to look for organizations whose mission you agree with.
aKgfnoc7kv.Revised: Take some time to look for organizations whose mission you agree with <before supporting them>.

VtTvLljOzM.Original: A round brush gives you more control over each section of hair.
VtTvLljOzM.Revised: A round brush gives you more control over each section of hair <since it grips from all sides>.

HP6vZ962J8.Original: This will show a translucent version of the frames before and after the one you're working on.
HP6vZ962J8.Revised: This will show a translucent version of the frames before and after the one you're working on <which makes it much easier to animate>.

uVKsvNNk0E.Original: You're not alone, anymore, and things are going to get easier.
uVKsvNNk0E.Revised: You're not alone, anymore, and things are going to get easier <from this point onward>.

JLd1G14L70.Original: You need some tools and instruments! You can use a toy doctor's kit, or you can make your own using kitchen utensils, pencils, blocks, other toys, or anything else that you can pretend to be medical instruments.
JLd1G14L70.Revised: You need some tools and instruments <to be a doctor>! You can use a toy doctor's kit, or you can make your own using kitchen utensils, pencils, blocks, other toys, or anything else that you can pretend to be medical instruments.

KQUzfGPfxk.Original: This is a great option for themed weddings.
KQUzfGPfxk.Revised: This is a great option for themed weddings <where costumes are encouraged>.

M22mELUnWD.Original: Invite her to go for ice cream.
M22mELUnWD.Revised: Invite her to go for ice cream or <something similar you both like>.

iGX_Wi4MuJ.Original: Speak as softly and as little as possible.
iGX_Wi4MuJ.Revised: Speak as softly and as little as possible <as you are recovering>.

PbVnhEGWWI.Original: Buy a pair of large pants, big enough that you can pull them down to your belly-button and fit a head and arm in one leg.
PbVnhEGWWI.Revised: Buy a pair of large pants, big enough that you can pull them down <over your head> to your belly-button and fit a head and arm in one leg.

1z_VnuNAsx.Original: Enter the field as a social worker or counselor.
1z_VnuNAsx.Revised: Enter the field as a social worker or counselor <based on your focus>.

z_ojsUb7Uh.Original: The Temple Run was the final challenge.
z_ojsUb7Uh.Revised: The Temple Run was the final challenge <on all shows>.

bej829BK--.Revised: Learn about the procedure <you will be having>.

6n6d-j8l5e.Revised: Open the phone book <to the index>.

U3aCFOi-TA.Original: Capping a gas line is not a complicated thing to do.
U3aCFOi-TA.Revised: Capping a gas line is not a complicated thing to do <if you do it correctly>.

NY9aaBn47E.Original: Spray the cat with a squirt of water.
NY9aaBn47E.Revised: Spray the cat <when he climbs on the curtains> with a squirt of water.

1QvCeht1Ok.Original: Now shave your legs as you normally do.
1QvCeht1Ok.Revised: Now shave your legs as you normally do <if you were in a shower>.

WKOzdjP3ED.Original: Use a styling comb with small teeth to part your hair off to one side.
WKOzdjP3ED.Revised: Use a styling comb with small teeth, <such as a rat tail comb>, to part your hair off to one side.

Ow-yQ7gcgy.Original: Coat your hands in cornstarch before handling fondant.
Ow-yQ7gcgy.Revised: Coat your hands in cornstarch before handling fondant <to prevent finger prints>.

g7cLZRyhNd.Original: You can also get Vitamin D through natural sunlight.
g7cLZRyhNd.Revised: You can also get Vitamin D through natural sunlight, <as this triggers your body to produce the vitamin>.

woharn5z9O.Revised: Consider giving your dog medication <under a vet's recommendation>.

qDgKKPWaat.Original: Fold to look like a small half sheet of paper.
qDgKKPWaat.Revised: Fold <one more time> to look like a small half sheet of paper.

YTU4F7xyxB.Original: Lay on your back with your knees in a table top position.
YTU4F7xyxB.Revised: Lay on your back with your knees in a table top position <with your arms crossed over your chest>.

bYm-fGJgqk.Original: Keeping the water moving will reduce mosquitoes, a popular attraction for toads.
bYm-fGJgqk.Revised: Keeping the water moving <with a fountain or waterfall> will reduce mosquitoes, a popular attraction for toads.

lveBcJV7hj.Revised: Talk with your date <about their interests>.

AO98PcaCqQ.Original: Outline and cut a sheet of brown wrapping paper about 1/2 inch (1.27 cm) shy of the actual size of the mounted canvas
AO98PcaCqQ.Revised: Outline and cut a sheet of brown wrapping paper about 1/2 inch (1.27 cm) shy of the actual size of the mounted canvas <on each side>.

2BpdIFnkDI.Revised: Watch for dry mouth or <excess saliva>.

WSLJz6Xis3.Original: Being married to someone who is troubled is extremely challenging and can take a toll on your physical and mental health.
WSLJz6Xis3.Revised: Being married to someone who is troubled is extremely challenging and can take a toll on your physical and mental health, <especially if being with them puts you in danger>.

KfRze--yoX.Original: Give him one last goodbye kiss.
KfRze--yoX.Revised: Give him one last goodbye kiss <if you feel its appropriate>.

mFiZcK5PLi.Original: To disable the Indexing Service, open My Computer, Right-click on the hard drive and click on the check box to clear the check mark next to "Allow indexing service to index this hard drive for faster searching".
mFiZcK5PLi.Revised: To disable the Indexing Service, open My Computer, Right-click on the hard drive, <go to properties> and click on the check box to clear the check mark next to "Allow indexing service to index this hard drive for faster searching".

5SjY1K5V3A.Original: Alternately, avoid foods whose nutrition labels list fat content and sodium levels that are through the roof.
5SjY1K5V3A.Revised: Alternately, avoid foods whose nutrition labels list fat content and sodium levels that are through the roof, <especially when the serving size is relatively small>.

Le9hEhDSK_.Original: The key to avoiding addiction is setting achievable goals for yourself and not letting exercise become an obsession.
Le9hEhDSK_.Revised: The key to avoiding addiction <while also doing regular physical activity> is setting achievable goals for yourself and not letting exercise become an obsession.

LNFMkjVb7T.Original: Searching the database is not unlike using a search engine, but there are a couple ways to do it that will help you get more out of your research.
LNFMkjVb7T.Revised: Searching the database is not unlike using a search engine, but there are a couple ways to do it that will help you get more out of your research, <such as using advanced search settings>.

IUuEf4GECt.Original: Use an orange stick to gently push back the cuticles.
IUuEf4GECt.Revised: Use an orange stick, <rather than a metal pusher>, to gently push back the cuticles.

WzJMmJ0jDb.Original: Buy all the tickets with your group at once, so that your seats are together.
WzJMmJ0jDb.Revised: Buy all the tickets with your group at once, so that your seats are together <or if it's general admission, agree to stick together once you've arrived at the venue>.

G9NAtcTDdP.Original: While there are many ways of making this delicious dish, here are a few takes on a delightful dessert.
G9NAtcTDdP.Revised: While there are many ways of making this delicious dish, here are a few takes on a delightful dessert <that work well at home>.

6J6776_j3c.Original: Not everyone is born a chef, but most will find that some element of cooking is relaxing.
6J6776_j3c.Revised: Not everyone is born a chef, but most will find that some element of cooking is relaxing and <that stimulates a bit of creativity>.

uNUmxhbNVr.Original: This could be a great downfall and could be considered shallow.
